holdings.infoBox: USMD is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 8.26%, Intel at 4.96%, Broadcom at 4.73%, Alphabet at 4.55%, and NVIDIA at 4.45%.

overview.description: The CoreValues America First Technology ETF (USMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation US companies that are expected to benefit from the advancement of strategically important technologies critical to US innovation, national security, and industrial leadership. USMD was launched on Feb 6, 2026 and is issued by CoreValues Alpha.
